description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a wide, rectangular display and a slim profile. The front features a large, glossy screen bordered by a thin, black bezel, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The television is supported by a V-shaped stand with splayed legs, which offers stability and a minimalist aesthetic. The back of the television is plain and matte, with no visible branding or ports, emphasizing its clean design. The side views reveal the extremely thin depth of the screen, highlighting its lightweight and space-saving construction. This television would be suitable for placement in living rooms, public waiting areas, or urban lounges.
description: A slim, modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel and a minimalist V-shaped stand. The display is large and glossy, with a sleek, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, glossy screen with a thin black bezel and the V-shaped stand clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the extremely thin profile of the television and the splayed legs of the stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, matte back panel and the full width of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim depth and the symmetrical stand design.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin, black, plastic bezel with a sleek and minimalist appearance.
